steps.title: Show the sentence's support role
steps.content: The sentence before the underlined one says other animals also find tools helpful. The underlined sentence gives a concrete case: boxer crabs use stinging anemones to defend against attack.

steps.title: Reject unsupported functions
steps.content: Choice A is about humans, but the underlined sentence is about boxer crabs. Choice C claims a frequency comparison that the sentence never makes. Choice D claims boxer crabs are smarter than birds, but the passage does not compare their intelligence. The answer is B.
